en: never brought in a CEO, and he was a teenager.
ko: CEO를 데려온 적이 없고, 그는 십대였어요.

en: Call me after. Okay. Oh, thanks.
You don't have to. I can open the door.
ko: 괜찮아. 내가 문 열 수 있어.

en: Okay, so this shouldn't take more than an hour,
ko: 좋아, 이건 한 시간 이상 걸리지 않을 거야,

en: but if you can't stay here, I'll call Becky,
ko: 하지만 여기 있을 수 없다면, 베키에게 전화할게,

en: and then she'll find you, and then you can just pull up.
ko: 그러면 그녀가 너를 찾아서, 너는 그냥 오면 돼.

en: All right. Out of here. I think you're good to eat today.
ko: 좋아. 이제 나가자. 오늘은 괜찮을 것 같아.

en: Should I pick you up some sushi?
No, I eat too much mercury.
I'm actually kind of nauseous, so...
